name: Submenu
description: Groups child navigation items under a collapsible parent within a Sidebar, rendering them indented when expanded.

props.name: parent
props.description: The parent menu item (rendered at the top)

props.name: expanded
props.description: Whether the submenu children are visible

props.name: children
props.description: Child menu items (rendered indented below parent)

props.name: slotContent
props.description: Additional slot content at the bottom

states.rationale: Pure layout wrapper — no interactive states. Expand/collapse controlled by the expanded prop; visual states belong to child SidebarItems.

propertyMapping.note: Boolean — false shows parent only, true shows parent + indented children

useWhen: Building hierarchical sidebar navigation with collapsible sections
Grouping related SidebarItem children under a parent header
Nesting navigation levels within a Sidebar
doNotUseFor: Dropdown menus or popovers — use List + ListItem
Top-level navigation — use Tabs or standalone SidebarItems
